name: dealer.users
query: SELECT id, sso_user_id, country_id, province_id, city_id, location_id, name, first_name, last_name, display_name, email, phone, secondary_phone, company_name, company_registration_number, address, address_2, postcode, national_identity_number, tax_identification_number, gender, date_of_birth, win_auctions_count, auctions_count, bids_count, reviews_count, reviewers_count, reviews_rating, point, membership_tier, purchase_now_quota, fcm_uuid, fcm_uuids, password, is_active, is_verified, is_blacklist, has_request_verification, first_login, last_login, last_activity_at, first_login_app, last_login_app, preferences, notification_preferences, auction_preferences, verification_data, additional_data, social_data, pubnub_data, whitelist, search_cache, search_cache_updated_at, search_cache_status, organization_id, remember_token, app_allow_notification, app_allow_sound, password_changed_at, created_at, updated_at, language, locale, dealer_category, business_grade, activity_grade, extra_notes, is_auction, is_genie, read_messages_at, facebook_account_id, facebook_access_token, lark_open_id, iid, active_group_id, onboarder_id, partnership_executive_id, app_preferences, deleted_at, assigned_at, creator_id, assignee_id, notes, note_updated_at, last_note_by, is_manager, is_high_risk_buyer, stripe_id, pm_type, pm_last_four, trial_ends_at FROM users;
